contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 25
- Description: Solidified handoff protocol (GO convention + agent-agnostic runbook); verified Sophia's @1.0.1 fix is live
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/370
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/371
  
  Details:
  Codified the handoff end-state Gary wanted. SOPHIA_HANDOFFS.md now has: (1) an agent-agnostic 5-step runbook so any local LLM (Claude/Cursor/Kimi/Codex) hands off identically — write plan → commit to main (durable handoff) → registry row → trigger Sophia → record thread_id; (2) the GO convention — after a handoff Sophia is parked in a topic with full context posted, every kickoff ends with the GO prompt, and the governor authorizes the WHOLE plan with a short 'go for it' (or go/proceed/ship it), on which Sophia executes from RESUME HERE through all gates (open-PR-don't-auto-merge, verify/runtime-smoke-test, Generated-by trailer) and reports in-thread with no per-step confirmation; (3) the tooling reality — Sophia can only post into topics she creates (no post-to-existing-thread tool), so handoffs let her create + report the topic rather than targeting a pre-existing thread (this is why the thread-3 attempt didn't land). PRs #369 (protocol-not-a-bridge fix), #370 (runbook + GO convention), #371 (topic-creation reality + tracker → 1695). Also verified Sophia's Issue 1 is genuinely done: dao_protocol #69 (merged) republished @truesight_dao/dao-client@1.0.1 with the browser global fixed via an esbuild footer (globalThis.DaoClient = the class) + a runtime smoke test asserting the global shape; confirmed live on npm (latest 1.0.1) and unpkg (200, global = class). Oracle + capoeira are now unblocked; Sophia is parked GO-ready in topic 1695.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 41.67
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
